description:
Professional lighting and sensor planning

Standard-compliant planning and simulation of artificial light, daylight and sensors in real time. For beginners and professionals in lighting planning. Intuitive operation, simple and fast display of the calculation values.
ADDED

Ai 2D -> 3D: Extract rooms from PDF floor plans.
AI Rendering: Create an AI image with a realistic sense of space based on the current scene and camera angle.
European standard for emergency lighting EN1838:2024
ReluxSport: Freely positioned calculation grids using an Excel list of coordinates.
CSV export functionality within ReluxCAD is now fully available to all ReluxDesktop users.

CHANGED

Emergency lighting functions have been modernised.

FIXED

Objects could disappear because the collision check status was not correctly reset or updated in calculation modes like Real-time Rendering or Sport Interacitve Mode.
False colors and border lines were incorrectly output for hemicylindrical illuminance results.
Resolved an issue where GLDF datasheets were not rendering correctly.
